phases.name: Stabilize — tests green, CI live, repo clean
phases.gating_predicate: WO-CODEREF-CORE-MCP-SERVER-AND-INTELLIGENCE-FIXES-001 Phase 1 executes; suite 1618/0 failures; CI workflow enforcing build-then-test

items.description: Update 11-field locked validation-report contract to 12 fields (header_coverage_pct) in output-validation-report.test.ts AND noregress comment, same commit
Rebuild dist first (stale-dist prime suspect), then fix populate-cli Phase 3 output + python auto-detect tests
Add .github/workflows/ci.yml (npm ci, build, vitest run) — first CI for this repo
Remove root build artifacts, nul, AGENTS.md.backup, pnpm-lock.yaml; .gitignore *.log
Remove @babel/*, acorn (+protobufjs if unused); add engines/license/repository to package.json

phases.name: Local-first RAG — no API key required, headerless repos indexable

items.description: rag-index.ts:93 + rag-search.ts: default provider ollama/nomic-embed-text when no cloud key; cloud opt-in
--include-headerless: embed header_status_missing chunks with header:false provenance instead of skipping
Measure 113MB semantic-registry.json write path; shard v1 or file follow-up stub with design
rag-index dogfood on coderef-core with local stack; cures 27-day vector staleness

phases.name: coderef-mcp-server — native MCP surface over .coderef intelligence
phases.gating_predicate: Phase 2 complete; @modelcontextprotocol/sdk pinned and stdio smoke test passes

items.description: src/cli/coderef-mcp-server.ts: 6 read-only tools (what_calls, what_imports, impact_of, find_element, codebase_summary, validation_status) wrapping QueryExecutor + artifact readers; compact responses
__tests__/mcp-server.test.ts behavioral tests against fixture artifacts; schema drift = build error
Write CODEREF-CORE/.mcp.json registering server under name coderef-core (absent today, clean create)

phases.name: Integration — skills updated, landed on main, team notified
phases.gating_predicate: Phase 3 complete (server builds, tests pass, smoke verified)

items.description: Review 10 CORE skills referencing CORE CLIs; /new-coderef-skill UPDATE for contract-drifted ones (rag-index, rag-search, rag-status, coderef-rag-server most likely)
Land all work to main and git push origin (operator instruction: proper git push)
ASSISTANT registers the MCP domain as coderef-core; verify tools visible in a fresh Claude Code session
Notify team on the new tool (send-chat / Discord status): tool list + how sessions consume them

chronology_callouts.description: Phase 4 main landing requires Phase 1's CI to be live and green — true dependency, not pure sequencing
Phase 4 MCP domain registration requires Phase 3's built server bin and .mcp.json — true dependency
Phase 3 MCP server does not technically require Phase 2 RAG changes (graph/index tools only); sequenced for single-WO discipline, could parallelize if needed
